verdict.task: Digital Twin: Continuous Steel Casting (Normal Mode)
s_llm_issues: Non-functional code - uses completely fabricated PyChrono API
Wrong import: 'import chrono' instead of 'import pychrono as chrono'
Non-existent classes: chrono.Material, chrono.Body, chrono.Joint, chrono.Axis, chrono.connect, chrono.world
Syntax errors - missing closing parentheses on chrono.connect calls
Code is incomplete - cuts off mid-implementation
baseline_strengths: Correct pychrono API usage (ChSystemNSC, ChBodyEasyBox, ChBodyEasyCylinder)
All required bodies: tundish, mold, cooling zone, rollers, strand
Realistic sensor simulation with Gaussian noise
Alarm system with correct thresholds: temp +-20C, water +-20%, vibration +30-50%
Chemical composition batch updates every 900s (~15 min as specified)
All normal-mode parameters: 1520C, 1.4 m/min, 1200 m3/h, 4.0 mm/s

physical_simulation.note: S-LLM code does not run at all

task_requirements.note: Baseline fulfills all requirements, S-LLM fulfills none

code_quality.note: S-LLM has syntax errors and wrong API throughout

verdict.conclusion: S-LLM code is fundamentally broken and cannot execute. Baseline correctly implements every requirement with proper PyChrono calls, visualization, sensors, alarms, and analytics.
